title: taraxacum niveum
intro: Taraxacum niveum, also known as the white dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its white or pale yellow flowers and edible leaves. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum niveum include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support digestive health, boost the immune system, and act as a natural diuretic, making it a popular herbal remedy for urinary tract issues. Taraxacum niveum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being consumed raw in salads or as a food supplement.
